expectations.text: Restates the problem before proposing anything
expectations.evidence: Jumps straight to 'Это классическая проблема с путями в Node.js' — no restatement

expectations.text: Asks at least one clarifying question before offering fixes
expectations.evidence: Asks for error text, which file does the import, directory listing — but simultaneously dumps 5 possible causes

expectations.text: Does NOT propose a concrete fix/command in the first response
expectations.evidence: Proposes 'ls -la lib/' and 'ls -la lib/utils*' commands and lists 5 fix directions

expectations.text: Separates symptom from possible root causes
expectations.evidence: Lists causes but doesn't explicitly separate what user sees vs what's actually wrong

expectations.text: Asks ONE question at a time (not a barrage of 3+)
expectations.evidence: Asks 3 things at once: exact error, which file, directory listing
